items.caption: A red lockbox with the text "office 365 lock box" and "lock out for safety" printed on it. the lockbox has a keyhole and four different colored key tags attached to it, indicating that it can be locked out for safety. the lockbox is designed to secure sensitive documents or equipment, and the key tags suggest that multiple users can access the lockbox with their respective keys. the lockbox is set against a white background, and the style of the image is a product photograph with a focus on the lockbox and its features.
